PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for (petitioner) Charles Wege. Jonathon Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Ferdon stated that if the petitioner is bondable and ready to file a final accounting the SFPA would not want to impede progress. Mr. Nuris stated that his client is bondable, the current estate value is $1,576,000.00, bond is required in the amount of $1,580,000.00, and that the current accounting petition is scheduled for March 24, 2015 and just needs minor amendments. The petition for letters of administration with will annexed as well as the accounting petition scheduled for March 24, 2015 were continued to April 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and a status of filing of bond is set for same date. Mr. Ferdon is to be included on the notice.

3/12/15 Correction to the above minutes: The petition for letters of administration with will annexed was to be granted, subject to written order, with bond in the amount of $1,580,000.00. It was inadvertently continued to 4/7/15 but has been corrected as of this date. Leslie Gomez.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1963 33rd Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for Aaron Aharonian.

The sale was confirmed at $743,900.00 to Thomas Wong and Cheryl Zhang based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed June 2, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $119,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1960 Helen Road, Pleasant Hill, Ca 94523)
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for and with Aaron Aharonian. Charles Wege real estate agent also present.

Mr. Nuris provided an endorsed copy of an amended notice of hearing indicating date of mailing which he filed this morning. Mr. Nuris also confirmed the correct spelling of the buyers name as "Quaiattani LLC". The sale was confirmed at $431,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
